pages.comingSoon: This page is coming soon. Check back later!
pages.aboutIntro: Simple Mining makes professional cloud mining accessible to everyone — no hardware, no hassle, just transparent returns.
pages.aboutMissionDesc: We operate enterprise-grade mining infrastructure so investors worldwide can earn passive income with confidence. Every plan is backed by real hardware, live uptime tracking, and payouts every 10 days.
pages.aboutVideoDesc: Watch how we operate — from datacenter to dashboard.
pages.aboutValue1Desc: Real-time dashboard, clear plan terms, and visible machine status.
pages.aboutValue2Desc: Bank-grade account protection with email verification and optional 2FA.
pages.videoPlaceholderHint: Place about.mp4 in public/videos/ or set NEXT_PUBLIC_ABOUT_VIDEO_URL

landing.heroSubtitle: Invest with full transparency: earn mining profit every 10 days, then receive 100% of your principal back when your plan completes.
landing.howItWorksDesc: Start earning in three simple steps — no hardware required.
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: Join thousands of satisfied miners worldwide.
landing.testimonial1Quote: Consistent payouts every 10 days. The dashboard makes it easy to track everything.
landing.testimonial2Quote: I started small and scaled up. The referral program is a great bonus on top of mining profits.
landing.testimonial3Quote: Professional platform with clear plan details. Deposits credited quickly and support responded fast.
landing.step1Desc: Create your account and get a unique deposit address.
landing.step2Desc: Deposit USDT and purchase a mining plan.
landing.step3Desc: When your plan finishes, your full investment is returned to your balance — plus all mining profit earned.
landing.platformStatsHint: Live platform metrics updated in real time.
landing.liquidationHint: Cumulative profits paid to miners worldwide
landing.plansIntro: Every plan shows exact math upfront: daily profit × duration, payouts every 10 days, and 100% principal returned at completion. Shared pools start only when the pool hits 100%.
landing.returnsBasedOnMin: Projections based on ${amount} min. contribution (pool timer starts at 100%)
landing.referralHeadlineDesc: Share your link. When anyone you refer buys a plan, you instantly earn 10% of every purchase — paid to your balance.
landing.referralLandingDesc: Invite friends and earn 10% commission on every plan they purchase. No limits on referrals.
landing.referralCommissionRate: 10% commission on every referred plan purchase
landing.sharedPlansHint: Pools activate when fully funded. Profit is split by each member's contribution.
landing.noPlansYetDesc: Mining plans are being configured. Register now to be ready when they launch.
landing.operationsDesc: Tour our operations — real infrastructure, transparent uptime, and professional-grade mining facilities powering your returns.
landing.operationsPoint2: Live monitoring and transparent payout cycles
landing.videoPlaceholderHint: Place operations.mp4 in public/videos/ or set NEXT_PUBLIC_OPERATIONS_VIDEO_URL in .env
landing.clipsDesc: Short insights from the Simple Mining team on Bitcoin, equipment, and building real mining wealth.
landing.clipMstrSharesDesc: When you buy MSTR, you own shares in a company that holds Bitcoin on its balance sheet.
landing.clipMstrExposureDesc: Bitcoin exposure isn't always direct — understand the layers before you invest.

welcome.en: Hi! I can guide you step-by-step: password reset, registration, deposits, plans, withdrawals, and referrals. I can also list current plans. What do you need?
welcome.ar: مرحباً! يمكنني إرشادك خطوة بخطوة: إعادة تعيين كلمة المرور، التسجيل، الإيداع، الخطط، السحب، والإحالات. كيف يمكنني مساعدتك؟

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about deposits, plans, pools, and withdrawals.
faq.q1a: Go to Dashboard → Deposit, choose your network (ERC20, BEP20, or TRC20), and send USDT to your address. Deposits are detected automatically in most cases.
faq.q2: What is the difference between solo and shared plans?
faq.q2a: Solo plans start immediately after purchase. Shared plans collect contributions from multiple users until the target is reached, then activate together with profit split by contribution share.
faq.q3: When do I receive mining profit?
faq.q3a: Profit accrues live on your dashboard and is credited every 10 days. When your plan duration ends, any remaining profit plus 100% of your principal is returned to your balance.
faq.q4: Do I get my full investment back?
faq.q4a: Yes — 100% of your plan principal is returned to your balance when the plan completes. Mining profit is paid every 10 days during the plan and is withdrawable separately from your deposit balance.
faq.q5a: Submit a withdrawal request from the Withdraw page. An admin reviews and approves each request manually before funds are sent.
faq.q6: When does a shared pool start mining?
faq.q6a: The pool stops accepting contributions at 100% fill — then mining starts for everyone and the duration clock begins. Your return math is: (your share × pool daily rate) × days, plus 100% of your contribution returned at the end.

returns.principalGuaranteeDesc: On day {days}, ${amount} — your full investment — is credited back to your balance automatically.
returns.miningRoi: +{roi}% mining ROI on top of principal
returns.poolStopNote: Pool still filling ({progress}%) — duration & payouts start when pool reaches 100% and stops accepting new funds.
returns.scienceTitle: How your money works — no guesswork
returns.scienceSubtitle: Simple Mining uses a fixed formula: daily rate × duration = total profit, plus 100% of your principal returned at the end. Every number on your plan card is calculated the same way.
returns.scienceStep1Desc: Your investment powers real hashrate. Each day, profit = principal × daily return %.
returns.scienceStep2Desc: Profits batch every {days} days for predictable cash flow — visible live on your dashboard before each credit.
returns.scienceStep3Desc: When the plan duration ends, your entire original investment is returned — profit is yours to keep or withdraw.
returns.examplePoolNote: Shared pools: the 100-day clock starts only after the pool stops filling at 100%.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: By registering you agree to use this platform for lawful purposes. You are responsible for securing your account credentials and any 2FA device.
terms.s2Body: All deposits must be sent on the correct network. Plan purchases are final once confirmed. Returns follow a fixed formula: daily return % × duration days = total mining profit. 100% of plan principal is returned when the plan completes.
terms.s3Body: Shared pool contributions lock until the pool reaches 100% and stops filling. Mining and the duration clock start together for all members. Profit is proportional to contribution; 100% of each member's contribution is returned at plan completion.
terms.s4Body: Withdrawals are limited to available profit balance and require admin approval. Processing times depend on manual review and network conditions.
terms.s5Body: We reserve the right to freeze accounts suspected of fraud, abuse, or violation of these terms. Contact support if you believe a freeze was made in error.
